title: University, College, Institution, School,这四个有什么区别吗？
snippet: Institution是泛称的教育机构，包括University、College、School、Institute等。 例句：Harvard University is an institution of higher learning in Cambridge, Massachusetts, United States.

title: 投SCI时，作者细节编辑中的affiliation与institution应该如何填写？
snippet: Jan 9, 2022 · affiliaton不是必填项，一般可以空着。 institution需要和manuscript中的作者单位保持一致，并且要手动输入并选择期刊网站里给出的单位名称。

title: What is a public institution staff position, and what is the ... - 知乎
snippet: Hello classmate, the public institution staff position is equivalent to the staff position in the public institution, with similar benefits to the civil servant position, but there are some differences.
